ddt:Target.Name: USM 2010_SW5_(v7.00) Official
ddt:Target.Description:
USM 2010
SW Compatibility : SW5 (Delivery SW5: 1st February 2011)
HW Compatibility : C (REF : 284B68847R--- / 284B66793R--- / 284B63613R--- / 284B60027R--- )
Projects: X91ph2 - L43 - L47 - X10 - X95ph2
X. CONDROYER (USM Pilot) tél : 01 76 83 30 10 xavier.condroyer@renault.com
F. THIEBAUT (USM Specification Pilot) tél : 01 76 85 37 43 florian.thiebaut@renault.com

Data.Name: Output Temporary Control List
Data.Description:
Temporary activation

Time base 1 seconds

  • Fan Unit, Wiper is activated using transition though Low Speed for High speed request
  • The wiper stops in Stop Position
  • Wiper protection is availabled during activation using diagnosis

Item.Text: Maximum clutch travel switch not active

Data.Name: V_TM_TimeAtOpening_mem
Data.Comment: Variable which contains the time of the last opening of the BDU during parking time (bad SOC)

Item.Text: Test Ok (Difference between actual and calculated value of BATT_Voltage_Sense is not more than 0.3)
Test NOK(Difference between actual and calculated value of BATT_Voltage_Sense is more than 0.3)
Running in idle mode or stopped
Oil Pressure Failure is not inhibited
counting and storage of CAN mute/absent failures masked
counting and storage of CAN mute/absent failures not masked
No oil pressure switch fault warning requested
Oil pressure switch fault warning requested
Primary ign supply relay ctrl OFF
Primary ign supply relay ctrl ON
no inhibition of neutral contact never reached diagnosis
inhibition of neutral contact never reached diagnosis
The BDU alert can only be erased by diag tool
The BDU alert disappears once the failure had
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit Range/Performance
Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit Low
Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit High
Fuel Shutoff Valve "A" Control Circuit Low
Fuel Shutoff Valve "A" Control Circuit High

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data) Not applicable

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data) Not applica

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data) Applicable

Item.Text: No activation of IHM Low battery voltage
Activation of IHM Low battery voltage

Data.Name: C_TM_LowSpeedWipingProtection
Data.Comment: timeout of low speed wiping protection

Data.Name: C_TM_HighSpeedWipingProtection
Data.Comment: timeout of high speed wiping protection

Data.Name: C_TM_HighSpeedPeriod_limit_max
Data.Comment: detection wiping period of stress high speed

Data.Name: C_TM_LowSpeedPeriod_limit_max
Data.Comment: detection wiping period of stress low speed (blocking)

Item.Text: No direct compressor activation from ECM is used
Direct compressor activation from ECM is used
neutral contact diagnosis (algo plausibility) is inhibited
neutral contact diagnosis (algo plausibility) is not inhibited
No BDU command line failure - in
No auto stop blocked reached protection
Allows to switch OFF Ignition when VehicleSpeed is >0
Inhibits from switching OFF Ignition when VehicleSpeed is >0
Minimum clutch travel switch not active

Data.Name: C1d_interESM_X
Data.Description: C1d_interESM_X = [C_Pct_SOCZoneTravail_pt0 C_Pct_SOCZoneTravail_pt1 C_Pct_SOCZoneTravail_pt2 C_Pct_SOCZoneTravail_pt3 C_Pct_SOCZoneTravail_pt4 C_Pct_SOCZoneTravail_pt5 C_Pct_SOCZoneTravail_pt6]

Data.Name: V_U_Floating_prim
Data.Comment: Consigne de tension de floating primaire

Scaled.Format: Consigne de tension de floating primaire

Data.Name: V_K_CompressionBatM20_Init
Data.Comment: Régime de seconde compression voiture neuve

Data.Name: V_Pct_PerteSOC_Autorise
Data.Comment: Valeur de la perte de SOC autorisé

Data.Name: V_K_n
Data.Comment: Balance de prise en compte de la température ext ou moteur

Data.Name: V_U_batt_desat
Data.Comment: Consigne de tension batterie post désaturation alt

Data.Name: V_K_StopStart_state
Data.Comment: It corresponds to the state of the Stop&start function: inactive, active, unavailable nominal or not

Item.Text: Check of old battery before disconnection
Check of not old battery before disconnection
Only faults reports and alerts that MUST remain active during cranking or sleeping periods are enabled
All faults reports and alerts not related to APC power level are enabled
All faults reports and alerts are enabled

Data.Name: T_eq_cond
Data.Comment: Temperature d'equilibre estimé pendant la phase de parking

Data.Name: C2d_PWM_BULB_XY
Data.Description: C2d_PWM_BULB_XY=[C1d_PWM_BULB_X C1d_PWM_BULB_Y]

Data.Name: C2d_PWM_LED_XY
Data.Description: C2d_PWM_LED_XY=[C1d_PWM_LED_X C1d_PWM_LED_Y]

Data.Name: C_TM_RearGearPlausibFailureCp
Data.Comment: C_TM_RearGearPlausibFailureCpt=2; % [s] Time out to confirm rear gear failure [0;1;10]

Data.Name: C_V_RearGearFailVehiclSpeedThres
Data.Comment: C_V_RearGearFailVehiclSpeedThres=80; % [km/h] VehicleSpeed threshold to consider a rear gear fail

Data.Name: C_B_2ndCompInhibition
Data.Comment: C_B_2ndCompInhibition = 0; % [-] Inhibition flag of 2nd Compression function [0;1;1]

Data.Name: C_B_ReflexStart
Data.Comment: C_B_ReflexStart=1; %[] Flag to indicate if the reflex strat is present or not

Data.Name: C_TM_Stop_req
Data.Comment: C_TM_Stop_req = 60; %[s] Max duration of setting in stop before failure [0;1;180]

Data.Name: C_RPM_DisplayEngineStop
Data.Comment: C_RPM_DisplayEngineStop=450; % [Rpm] Engine RPM for Display Alerte Stop Auto [0;1;700

Data.Name: C_TM_SSVSActivationBeforeBoost
Data.Comment: = 0.005; % [s] Time out between SSVS activation and Boost mode [0.005;0.005;0.1]

Data.Name: C_B_SSVSStartMask
Data.Comment: C_B_SSVSStartMask=1; % [boolean] Flag to mask the starter delay

Data.Name: C_K_NBR_BRK_1
Data.Comment: C_K_NBR_BRK_1= 3; %[-] Number of brakes before triggering pressostat in stop phase [0;1;63]

Data.Name: C_TM_DefautBouton
Data.Comment: C_TM_DefautBouton =20; %[s] Button duration support to declar it in fault [0;1;60]

Data.Name: BatteryDischargeByESM_OK
Data.Comment: Autorisation de décharge batterie en ESM

Data.Name: C_B_CyclingInhibition
Data.Comment: inhibition fonctionnalité compteur d'usure par cyclage

Data.Name: C_B_CorrosionInhibition
Data.Comment: inhibition fonctionnalité compteur d'usure par corrosion

Data.Name: C_B_WaterPumpControlledByUSM
Data.Comment: C_B_WaterPumpControlledByUSM =1; %[] Pump controlled by USM or not [0;1;1]

Data.Name: PWM & Voltage Output Temporary Control List
C1d_Pct_EngSpeed_Y
Data.Description: C1d_interESM_X = [C_Pct_SOCZoneTravail_pt0 C_Pct_SOCZoneTravail_pt1 C_Pct_SOCZoneTravail_pt2 C_Pct_SOCZoneTravail_pt3 C_Pct_SOCZoneTravail_pt4 C_Pct_SOCZoneTravail_pt5 C_Pct_SOCZoneTravail_pt6]

Data.Name: V_K_Activation_driver
Data.Comment: Stop&Start function activation or deactivaton requested by the customer;

Data.Name: C_B_ABSMalfunction
Data.Comment: Flag to indicate if ABSMalfunction value has to be considered or not :1=considered; 0=ABSMal Inhibit

Item.Text: Stop Auto Authorised in case of ABS Malufunction flags
No Stop Auto in case of ABS Malufunction flags

Data.Name: DataRecorderData_01
Data.Comment: DataRecorder : Trigg Event recorded : "Stop Auto Entering".
Data.Description:
Datarecorder Diag service N01:

Event Triggered : "Stop Auto Entering"

Return All data. (35bytes*7 bytes)

Data.Name: DataRecorderData_02
Data.Description:
Datarecorder Diag service N02:

Event Triggered : "Engine Start (Initial + S&S"

Return All data. (35bytes*7 bytes)

Data.Name: DataRecorderData_03
Data.Description:
Datarecorder Diag service N03:

Event Triggered : "StopAuto => End of mission"

Return All data. (35bytes*7 bytes)

Data.Name: DataRecorderData_04
Data.Description:
Datarecorder Diag service N04:

Event Triggered : "EngineAuto Relaunch By Injection"

Return All data. (35bytes*7 bytes)

Request.Name: Start Diagnostic Session
Request.Comment: Start diagnostic session

Request.Name: Read Digital Inputs
Request.Comment: Read digital inputs Saved in RAM

Request.Name: Read Analog Inputs
Request.Comment: Read analog inputs Saved in RAM

Request.Name: Read Digital Outputs
Request.Comment: Read digital outputs Saved in RAM

Request.Name: Read Diagnostic Inputs
Request.Comment: Read diagnostic inputs Saved in RAM

Request.Name: Read PWM Outputs
Request.Comment: Read PWM outputs Saved in RAM

Request.Name: Digital Outputs Control
Request.Comment: Control output. Temporary IO control Saved in RAM

Request.Name: ReadMemoryByAdress
Request.Comment: Saved in EEPROM (calibrations data)

Request.Name: Read sent CAN data
Request.Comment: Saved in RAM

Request.Name: Read received CAN data
Request.Comment: Saved in RAM

Request.Name: Read config
Request.Comment: Saved in EEPROM

Request.Name: Read VIN
Request.Comment: Read vehicle number identification Saved in EEPROM

Request.Name: Traceability
Request.Comment: Managed by supplier, must be clarify by supplier Saved if possible in ROM otherwise in EEPROM

Request.Name: Read CAN status
Request.Comment: Read CAN Status Saved following CRS document (EEPROM and RAM)/ see "CRS v2.0" document for Communication Protocol and 36-02-027 --a document for Can Sleep Specification

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: Application DTC in EEPROM and Routine DTC in RAM

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: Requete non utilisable dans les outils standard de DDT2000 / Application DTC in EEPROM

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: Read calibrations
Request.Comment: Saved in EEPROM

Request.Name: WriteMemoryByAdress
Request.Comment: Saved in EEPROM (calibrations data)

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: Read Diagnosis calibrations
Request.Comment: Saved in EEPROM

Request.Name: Read SmartFet calibrations
Request.Comment: Saved in EEPROM

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: Read EEM variables
Request.Comment: Read digital outputs Saved in RAM

Request.Name: PWM & Voltage Outputs Control
Request.Comment: Control output. Temporary IO control Saved in RAM

DataItem.Name: PWM & Voltage Output Temporary Control List

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: Read LIN status
Request.Comment: Read CAN Status Saved following CRS document (EEPROM and RAM)/ see "CRS v2.0" document for Communication Protocol and 36-02-027 --a document for Can Sleep Specification

Label.Text: ATTENTION LES CONFIGS NE SONT PAS INDEPENDANTES - REECRIRE TOUTES LES VALEURS AVANT DE FAIRE SEND

Input.DataName: PWM & Voltage Output Temporary Control List

Label.Text: Stop / Start - Analyse des conditions de non arrêt automatique moteur
Climatisation - contact = B. Gillot/ V. Le-Lay
Airbag - contact = AKKA (S. Tranier)/ A. Pietersoone
Bouton Inhibition S/S - contact = B. Hanotte
Detection Presence Conducteur - contact = B. Hanotte
Gestion Réseau de Bord - contact = D. Blanchard
En Jaune = Valeurs attendues pour faire du StopStart
voir compteurs corrosion et cyclage ci-dessous
Gestion Réseau de Bord - contact = D. Blanchard
En Jaune = Valeurs attendues pour faire du StopStart
REMISE A ZERO UNIQUEMENT HORS APC
